series_metadata.series_description: Title IV-E kinship subsidy program for children/youth/young adults age 0 to 21. Includes application, redetermination, approval, denial, disability, and termination forms. Includes eligibility documents such as legal custody, home study, educational, employment, and disability records. Includes kinship caregiver support related documents such as tax forms, mortgage statements, utility statements, cell phone statements, auto insurance policies, state and federal criminal background checks. Includes task completion checklists and case activity notes.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain office permanently. Permanently, Electronic: Permanent
